task_completion.description: Verifies the agent logged into OpenClinic GA with user '4'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinic GA web interface is visible, showing a main menu or dashboard, indicating successful login past the login screen and any password-change dialog.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent created the insurer in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An insurer management or 'Gestion des assureurs' screen showing a record with name containing 'MediShield' and/or accounting code 'MSPA', or a confirmation message after saving the insurer.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent assigned the insurer to patient Carlos Mendoza (ID 10002).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A patient record screen for Carlos Mendoza (ID 10002) showing an insurance or 'Mutuelle' section with the new insurer assigned, or a form showing policy number 'MSPA-2026-4471'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent created the SPEC01 Specialist Consultation service.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A service management or 'Gestion des prestations' screen showing a service with code 'SPEC01', description 'Specialist Consultation', and price '45.00' or '45'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent recorded a consultation charge for patient Carlos Mendoza.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A patient billing, debit, or 'Prestations pour patient' screen showing the 'SPEC01' or 'Specialist Consultation' service added to patient 10002's charges, with amount 45.00.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent generated an insurer invoice for the new insurer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An insurer invoice screen or 'Factures assureur' page showing an invoice addressed to the insurer (MediShield / MSPA), containing the consultation charge.

task_completion.description: Verifies the pre-existing uninsured charge was NOT included in the insurer invoice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The insurer invoice shows only the new Specialist Consultation charge (45.00), not the prior General Consultation charge (30.00). If both charges appear on the insurer invoice, this check fails.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the web GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed in a web browser navigating the OpenClinic GA interface. No terminal windows executing database queries or API scripts should be used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verifies the screens are genuine OpenClinic GA pages.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screens match the standard OpenClinic GA UI with French-language menus and forms. No text editors, HTML editors, or external mockup tools are used to fake the results.

integrity.description: Verifies browser developer tools were not used to manipulate data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open or being used to inject JavaScript, manipulate DOM, or execute SQL to bypass the GUI workflow.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected insurer name: 'MediShield Pan-Africa' or 'MediShield Pan-Africa Ltd'. Expected accounting code: 'MSPA'. Target patient: Carlos Mendoza, ID 10002 (database stores name as 'MENDOZA CARLOS'). Expected service: code 'SPEC01', description 'Specialist Consultation', price 45.00. Expected policy number: 'MSPA-2026-4471'. TRAP: A pre-existing General Consultation charge of 30.00 (code GENCON) exists for this patient from 14 days ago. This charge predates the insurance and must NOT appear on the insurer invoice. Only the new SPEC01 charge of 45.00 should be on the insurer invoice.
